calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Nov-10-2016 Vacated

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-12-2016 Set For Trial On Dec-05-16 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

Notice Of Motion To Vacate Judgment
Off Calendar May-05-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Attorney Vivian Lerche telephone number 415-680-5731 specially appearing for Plaintiff Portfolio Recovery Associates.
No other appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

The Court confirmed its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES LLC'S Motion To Vacate Judgment is granted. Defendant Zhi Huang does not oppose the granting of the motion. The prevailing party is to prepare a form of order that tracks the tentative ruling.

Judge: Harold Kahn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR #5976. (302/HK)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Feb-27-2014 Off Calendar
